task:
Open /home/user/Documents/gradient.png in GIMP — a 400x200 image with a horizontal gradient from black on the left to white on the right.

Apply a threshold of 128 to convert the image to pure black and white (every pixel below 128 becomes pure black (0,0,0); every pixel at or above 128 becomes pure white (255,255,255)). Export the result as PNG to /home/user/Documents/threshold_result.png. The output must remain 400x200 pixels.

verification.description: Exported threshold result PNG file exists
Left side pixel is pure black (below threshold)
Right side pixel is pure white (above threshold)
